personas.name: UX Designer
personas.description: Designs the UI/UX for the requested platform, prioritizing user experience and lovability above all else.

personas.name: Software Architect
personas.description: Designs the whole technical solution and decides all technical details in advance so the developer never has to re-decide anything.

personas.name: Developer
personas.description: Implements the architect's plan with high-quality, performant, maintainable code, following best practices.

personas.name: App Runner
personas.description: Runs the app depending on its technology

steps.argsTemplate: It runs the app generated by the developer on local. For example if the output is expo app then it should run expo commands, if it's react then it should run it.
